title: Document Inspector Perry
description: An opensource prototype for document search and question answering with large language models.

title: Booting Up Alignment Research #3
description: On how agents can game the systems the operate in, both the artifical agents and the natural ones.

title: Booting Up Alignment Research #2
description: Learn with me about the concept of Artificial General Intelligence and its potentially massive consequences.

title: Booting Up Alignment Research #1
description: In the “Booting Up Alignment Research” sequence I show you how I learn about the field of AI alignment.

title: Genie In A Bottle
description: Say you had a genie, firmly trapped in a bottle and awaiting your command. However you found it, you now have the ability to “have granted thy wishes three”. What would you do?

title: The Language Model Risk Field Guide
description: Join Carlo Lepelaars and myself as we explore the risks we think you should know about in the world of large language models and generative AI.

title: The Risk Of Trusting AI
description: Under uncertainty we can limit our exposure to the risk, even if we cannot predict the exact probabilities involved. Perhaps we should only run unpredictable AI systems if we can guarantee our safety when those systems fail.

title: GPT-4 - Master Conversationalist
description: I've been playing around with both GPT-3 and GPT-4, comparing them as we go, to see what all the fuss is really about. I'll try to show you that making GPT algorithms resistant to divulging unauthorized information is quite quite hard.

title: Generative AI - A Conversation With ChatGPT
description: I've been getting a lot of questions about ChatGPT and generative AI, mainly the impact the technology will have. I decided to ask ChatGPT for some answers.

title: Meditations On Tinkering
description: On the power of taking into consideration that which you do not know about.

title: A primer on financial independence
description: My thoughts on Financial Independence, and a quick primer into the subject.

title: Custom Models And Loss Functions In FastAI
description: Learn how to recognize handwritten digits, using a custom PyTorch model and loss function.

title: Detecting fruit using FastAI
description: If you've ever wanted your own photo based scanning device, you're on the right blog.
